---
id: disable-my-other-sessions
title: "Disable my other sessions"
description: "Calling this endpoint invalidates all except the current session that belong to the logged-in user."
sidebar_label: "Disable my other sessions"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: reference/openapi/ory-apis
custom_edit_url: null

import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails"
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema"
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes"
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs"
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem"
import Heading from "@theme/Heading"
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate"

<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Disable my other sessions"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"delete"} path={"/sessions"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

Calling this endpoint invalidates all except the current session that belong to the logged-in user. Session data are not deleted.

<Heading id={"request"} as={"h2"} className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
